cases.title: analyze-data understand-task recovery_gap
cases.summary: Agent tried to analyze data but could not find the source file because it was looking in the wrong directory and using the wrong filename.
cases.desired_outcome: Generate a summary report from a CSV dataset uploaded by the user.
cases.symptom: File not found error. The agent searched for 'data.csv' in the current directory but the file was named 'Q1_results.csv' in a subdirectory.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The agent has insufficient visibility into the available files.
cases.searchable_text: analyze-data Generate a summary report from a CSV dataset uploaded by the user. python File not found error. The agent searched for 'data.csv' in the current directory but the file was named 'Q1_results.csv' in a subdirectory. understand-task recovery_gap The agent has insufficient visibility into the available files. switch_to_local_file_inspection Run a recursive file listing to discover all available CSV files in the workspace. Agent tried to analyze data but could not find the source file because it was looking in the wrong directory and using the wrong filename. analyze-data understand-task recovery_gap file-location

cases.title: browse-web execute-task capability_mismatch
cases.summary: Agent used a static HTML fetch tool for a dynamically rendered page. Only the shell was captured, missing all content populated by JavaScript.
cases.desired_outcome: Extract the full product listing table from a retail website.
cases.symptom: The fetched HTML only contains the page skeleton. All product data loaded via JavaScript is missing.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The builtin fetch tool retrieves static HTML only. The product data on this page is rendered client-side via JavaScript, which static fetch cannot execute.
cases.searchable_text: browse-web Extract the full product listing table from a retail website. web_fetch The fetched HTML only contains the page skeleton. All product data loaded via JavaScript is missing. execute-task capability_mismatch The builtin fetch tool retrieves static HTML only. The product data on this page is rendered client-side via JavaScript, which static fetch cannot execute. switch_to_alternative_tool_path Switch to a browser-capable route that executes JavaScript. playwright-mcp can render the page and extract the full DOM. Agent used a static HTML fetch tool for a dynamically rendered page. Only the shell was captured, missing all content populated by JavaScript. browse-web execute-task capability_mismatch dynamic-rendering

cases.title: code-editing execute-task environment_or_config
cases.summary: Agent attempted to integrate a third-party API using guessed parameter names and structure, resulting in repeated authentication errors.
cases.desired_outcome: Integrate a payment gateway API into the existing application.
cases.symptom: Repeated API calls fail with authentication errors. The agent has tried different credential formats without success.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The agent is working from assumptions about API behavior rather than the actual specification.
cases.searchable_text: code-editing Integrate a payment gateway API into the existing application. code-editing Repeated API calls fail with authentication errors. The agent has tried different credential formats without success. execute-task environment_or_config The agent is working from assumptions about API behavior rather than the actual specification. switch_to_official_docs Fetch the payment gateway's official API documentation to understand the correct authentication flow. Agent attempted to integrate a third-party API using guessed parameter names and structure, resulting in repeated authentication errors. code-editing execute-task environment_or_config third-party-api

cases.title: code-editing configure-capability environment_or_config
cases.summary: Agent repeatedly failed to run a Python script because a required package was not installed in the environment.
cases.desired_outcome: Run a data visualization script that uses matplotlib and seaborn.
cases.symptom: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'seaborn'. The agent retried the script three times without addressing the missing dependency.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The execution environment is missing a required dependency. Retrying the script will not install seaborn.
cases.searchable_text: code-editing Run a data visualization script that uses matplotlib and seaborn. python ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'seaborn'. The agent retried the script three times without addressing the missing dependency. configure-capability environment_or_config The execution environment is missing a required dependency. Retrying the script will not install seaborn. switch_to_environment_debugging Install the missing seaborn package via pip, or fall back to matplotlib-only visualization. Agent repeatedly failed to run a Python script because a required package was not installed in the environment. code-editing configure-capability environment_or_config dependency

cases.title: code-editing recover-from-failure recovery_gap
cases.summary: Agent encountered an intermittent test failure that only reproduces 30% of the time.
cases.desired_outcome: Fix a failing unit test in the authentication module.
cases.symptom: The test fails intermittently — approximately 30% of runs produce a timeout error.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The intermittent nature of the failure makes it impossible to determine if a code change actually fixed the issue.
cases.searchable_text: code-editing Fix a failing unit test in the authentication module. code-editing The test fails intermittently — approximately 30% of runs produce a timeout error. recover-from-failure recovery_gap The intermittent nature of the failure makes it impossible to determine if a code change actually fixed the issue. switch_to_repro_minimization Create a minimal reproduction script that isolates the async HTTP call and runs it repeatedly to confirm the failure pattern. Agent encountered an intermittent test failure that only reproduces 30% of the time. code-editing recover-from-failure recovery_gap flaky-test

cases.title: create-presentation choose-capability task_framing_issue
cases.summary: Agent was asked to create a presentation but received no content outline, speaker notes, or design preferences.
cases.desired_outcome: Generate a slide deck for a quarterly business review.
cases.symptom: Every generated slide deck is rejected by the user for being too generic, wrong tone, or missing key metrics.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The task is underspecified. The agent cannot produce a satisfactory presentation without knowing the audience, key metrics, design preferences, or outline.
cases.searchable_text: create-presentation Generate a slide deck for a quarterly business review. pptx-generator Every generated slide deck is rejected by the user for being too generic, wrong tone, or missing key metrics. choose-capability task_framing_issue The task is underspecified. The agent cannot produce a satisfactory presentation without knowing the audience, key metrics, design preferences, or outline. request_missing_input Ask the user for: (1) key metrics or data points, (2) target audience, (3) preferred tone and design style. Agent was asked to create a presentation but received no content outline, speaker notes, or design preferences. create-presentation choose-capability task_framing_issue missing-input

cases.title: monitor-and-check execute-task capability_mismatch
cases.summary: Agent attempted to monitor a cloud service's status by scraping a public status page, but the page structure changed and the scraper broke.
cases.desired_outcome: Monitor the operational status of a cloud service and alert on incidents.
cases.symptom: The web scraper broke after the status page was redesigned. The CSS selectors no longer match.
cases.why_current_path_failed: Web scraping a status page is a fragile approach. The page structure can change at any time.
cases.searchable_text: monitor-and-check Monitor the operational status of a cloud service and alert on incidents. browser-cdp The web scraper broke after the status page was redesigned. The CSS selectors no longer match. execute-task capability_mismatch Web scraping a status page is a fragile approach. The page structure can change at any time. switch_to_api_or_connector_access Configure the cloud-status-api-mcp connector using the available API key for structured, stable data. Agent attempted to monitor a cloud service's status by scraping a public status page, but the page structure changed and the scraper broke. monitor-and-check execute-task capability_mismatch status-monitoring

cases.title: search-and-compare-tools understand-task capability_mismatch
cases.summary: Agent used a general web search to find technical API documentation, but the search results returned blog posts and tutorials instead of authoritative references.
cases.desired_outcome: Find the correct method signature for a specific library function.
cases.symptom: Web search returns blog posts and StackOverflow answers from 2022, which reference deprecated method signatures.
cases.why_current_path_failed: General web search is not the right tool for finding authoritative API documentation.

cases.title: transform-documents validate-output quality_miss
cases.summary: Agent generated a JSON config file but the output was missing required fields and had incorrect nesting.
cases.desired_outcome: Generate a valid JSON configuration file for a CI/CD pipeline.
cases.symptom: The generated JSON file is rejected by the CI/CD system. Missing required 'version' field, and the 'stages' array is nested under the wrong parent key.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The agent is generating JSON without validating against the target schema.

cases.title: workflow-automation choose-capability capability_mismatch
cases.summary: Agent was asked to build a full dashboard application in one task. It produced a partial implementation that mixed frontend, backend, and data pipeline code.
cases.desired_outcome: Build a data dashboard with charts, filters, and a backend API serving live metrics.
cases.symptom: The generated code mixes frontend components, API routes, and data transformation logic in a single file. The result is incomplete and unrunnable.
cases.why_current_path_failed: The task is too large for a single tool path. The agent needs to decompose it into independent sub-tasks.
cases.searchable_text: workflow-automation Build a data dashboard with charts, filters, and a backend API serving live metrics. code-editing The generated code mixes frontend components, API routes, and data transformation logic in a single file. The result is incomplete and unrunnable. choose-capability capability_mismatch The task is too large for a single tool path. The agent needs to decompose it into independent sub-tasks. decompose_task_first Split into three phases: (1) Design the data model and API contract, (2) Build the backend API, (3) Build the frontend. Agent was asked to build a full dashboard application in one task. It produced a partial implementation that mixed frontend, backend, and data pipeline code. workflow-automation choose-capability capability_mismatch complex-task
